description: WinGet is the Windows Package Manager. This project includes a CLI (Command Line Interface), PowerShell modules, and a COM (Component Object Model) API (Application Programming Interface).
commit_message:
Honor DSCv3 package installMode for silent and interactive (#6249)

## 📖 Description
When using DSCv3 Microsoft.WinGet/Package resource with installMode:
silent specified, WinGet was not honoring the requested mode and instead
defaulting to SilentWithProgress. This resulted in progress UI being
shown and manifest custom switches being omitted from installer
arguments.

This PR maps the installMode property (declared in DscPackageResource)
to execution context args (--silent or --interactive) be
